hero.role: Computer Engineering & HCID Student passionate about user interfaces and modern digital experiences.

about.title: I create digital experiences that
about.description1: I am a developer and designer currently pursuing a Double Degree in Human-Computer Interaction and Design at EIT Digital (Politecnico di Milano and Aalto University).
about.description2: My strong background in Computer Engineering, combined with my passion for UI/UX, allows me to bridge the gap between technical implementation and user needs.

projects.title: Featured
projects.subtitle: Explore my projects organized by category

ricerca.title: Research
ricerca.description: Research and development projects exploring new technologies and methodologies

projects.title: LLM Guardrails Research
projects.description: Research on safety guardrails for Large Language Models
projects.longDescription: In collaboration with professors Matteo Camilli and Giovanni Quattrocchi at Politecnico di Milano. The project explores the development and implementation of safety mechanisms to mitigate risks and promote responsible deployment of Artificial Intelligence, with an academic paper currently in progress.

projects.title: SynergyAI
projects.longDescription: Pre-seed startup developed during the High-Tech Entrepreneurship course at Politecnico di Milano. The project aims to facilitate B2B partnerships through AI-based matchmaking for exploring market opportunities.

full-stack.title: Full-Stack Development
full-stack.description: Complete web applications with modern frontend and robust backend

projects.title: Artendity
projects.description: Interactive web application to discover your own "Art DNA"
projects.longDescription: Developed for the Design of WWW Services course. Artendity allows users to take a visual quiz to discover their artistic preferences, receiving personalized recommendations and navigating an interactive gallery.

projects.title: Yoga Website
projects.longDescription: Built for the Hypermedia Applications course, this website combines a full-stack architecture with interactive multimedia content, offering an optimized user experience with a focus on responsive design.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android

projects.title: Flutter Flame Memory Game
projects.description: Cross-platform memory card game powered by the Flame engine
projects.longDescription: A device-agnostic memory game developed in Flutter with responsive interfaces. It features persistent level progression using Hive and adopts a robust state management approach.

xr.title: XR Projects
xr.description: Virtual, augmented, and mixed reality projects

projects.title: Hololimb
projects.description: XR app for rehabilitation through visual illusion
projects.longDescription: In collaboration with i3lab (Polimi), Hololimb is a Meta Quest 3 app aimed at reducing Phantom Limb Pain (PLP) by simulating a virtual limb to support patient rehabilitation therapy.

projects.title: CodingVirtualWorlds
projects.description: Programming and simulation of interactive worlds in VR
projects.longDescription: Project for the Coding Virtual Worlds course: design and implementation of multiple interactive VR environments for Meta Quest 3, culminating in the development of a networked multiplayer game.

consultancy.title: Consultancy
consultancy.description: Strategic consulting and technology implementation projects

projects.title: HR Consulting - SACE S.p.A.
projects.description: UX evaluation and engagement of HR tools
projects.longDescription: Team project on behalf of the Italian agency SACE, aimed at evaluating the usability and adoption of internal HR tools such as Workday and Coursera. Includes qualitative analysis through targeted interviews.

ux-oriented.title: UX-Oriented
ux-oriented.description: Projects focused on user experience and design thinking

projects.title: HCI Research & Prototyping
projects.description: Design and analysis of interactive systems
projects.longDescription: Development of three Human-Computer Interaction projects following the HCD approach (ISO 9241-210), including mental model analysis and high-fidelity prototype design with user testing.

skills.title: My
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life

contact.title: Let's Work
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Contact me and let's discuss how I can help.
contact.infoDesc: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
